steps.title: Find the row being requested
steps.content: The passage specifies “the area of the Yakama Nation in Washington” — this exactly identifies which row in the table to use.

steps.title: Extract the correct value
steps.content: The Yakama Nation, Washington row displays 2,188 square miles in the area column. The other options are all real values from the table but correspond to different nations. That matches choice D — D is correct.
